## 🎯 Type of Change

Please mark the relevant option:

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX improvement
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration change
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring
- [ ] ✅ Test addition/update

## 🔗 Related Issues

## 📋 Checklist

### Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I've added comments for complex logic
- [ ] I've removed any debug code or console.logs
- [ ] Variable names are clear and meaningful

### Testing

- [ ] I've tested my changes locally
- [ ] All tests pass: `npm run test`
- [ ] Linting passes: `npm run lint`
- [ ] Build succeeds: `npm run build`
- [ ] I've added tests for new features

### Documentation

- [ ] I've updated relevant documentation
- [ ] README is updated if needed
- [ ] Comments/docstrings are added where needed
- [ ] User-facing changes have docs updates

### Commits

- [ ] Commit messages are clear and descriptive
- [ ] No merge commits (rebased if needed)
- [ ] Commits are logically organized

### Final Checks

- [ ] I've reviewed my own code
- [ ] No new warnings or errors
- [ ] No breaking changes (or documented)
- [ ] Screenshots/recordings (if UI changes)

---
